subject: armored knight on horseback charging with sword drawn, crimson banner streaming
description: A humanoid figure in dark plate armor with gold trim rides a black horse at full charge. The figure holds a sword in one hand while a large crimson and purple banner streams dramatically behind them in the wind. The armor is detailed and form-fitting. The horse is powerful and dark-coated, shown mid-gallop with hooves off the ground. The sky behind is pale and overcast with scattered debris suggesting motion. The composition is wide and action-driven, emphasizing speed and forward momentum.
foreground: armored knight on black horse, sword in hand, banner streaming
background: pale overcast sky with scattered particles
emotion: fierce determination, forward momentum, head raised in charge
